websites.title: How much does a website cost
websites.text: Choose a plan based on how large of a website you need. We can always advise you on what is best for you.

simple.name: Simple Website
simple.desc: For small businesses wanting to be found online.

corporate.name: Corporate Website
corporate.desc: For companies that want more content and easier management.

large.name: Large Website
large.desc: When you need a larger website with a custom solution.

hosting.title: Hosting that pays off
hosting.text: You know exactly what you get for the price. No technical fluff, just clear limits and support.

start.name: Hosting Start
start.desc: Clear base for a smaller web. No complexities.

business.name: Hosting Business
business.desc: The best choice for a standard corporate website.

premium.name: Hosting Premium
premium.desc: For larger projects and multiple websites.

courses.title: Courses and Training
courses.text: We will teach you and your team to work with the web quickly, clearly, and without unnecessary theory.

start.name: Website Creation Process
start.desc: A practical guide from an idea to launching a corporate website.

popular.name: Web App Creation Process
popular.desc: How to properly design and build a web application in practice.

custom.name: Website Management
custom.desc: We will teach you how to manage the website long-term without depending on a supplier.

other.title: Additional Services
other.text: If you need something extra, we will prepare a simple custom plan with a clear price.

design.name: Website Visual Design
design.desc: We will prepare a clear foundation for the entire website.

automation.name: Automation of Routine Tasks
automation.desc: We will convert manual steps into an automated process.

webApps.title: When you need more than a classic website
webApps.text: We create a simple online system that saves time for you and your team.

start.name: Simple Web App
start.desc: For companies wanting to digitize one specific process.

business.name: Corporate Web App
business.desc: For companies wanting an app for daily operations.

custom.name: Large Web App
custom.desc: For projects with larger scope and individual requirements.
